title: Star Wars 5pc The Mandalorian Activity Coloring Book Crayons Kids Ages 3 and Up
description:
Is your child obsessed with Star Wars? This officially licensed Star Wars coloring book features characters from the hit TV show series - Baby Yoda and the Mandalorian! The large activity book measures 10.75” x 7.8”, the perfect size for occupying your child during long car rides and travel. It will easily fit inside most standard backpacks, book bags, or binders for even more on-the-go fun. The Star Wars coloring book comes with different pages for coloring, puzzles, and games like connect the dots, matching, counting, and more. Activity books are great for encouraging creativity and imagination while kids learn about math and drawing

Star Wars 5pc The Mandalorian Activity Coloring Book Crayons Kids Ages 3 and Up

Is your child obsessed with Star Wars? This officially licensed Star Wars coloring book features characters from the hit TV show series - Baby Yoda and the Mandalorian!

Key Features

  • STAR WARS COLORING BOOK - Officially licensed Star Wars coloring book features characters from the hit TV show - The Mandalorian and Baby Yoda
  • JUMBO-SIZED ACTIVITY BOOK - Large activity book measures 10.75” x 7.8”; fits inside most standard backpacks, book bags, or binders for on-the-go fun
  • EDUCATIONAL GIFT - Star Wars coloring book comes with pages for coloring, puzzles and games like connect the dots, counting, matching, and more; Encourages creativity and imagination
  • CRAYONS INCLUDED - Jumbo-sized coloring book comes with 4 different colors of crayons for kids to doodle and color with; Great for coloring while in the car or at school
  • SAFE FOR KIDS - All pieces included are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Choking hazard (small parts)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: SWYODCB4PC
  • UPC: 689860012998
  • Color: Yoda with Crayons
  • Size: 10.75 in x 7.8 in

The large activity book measures 10.75” x 7.8”, the perfect size for occupying your child during long car rides and travel. It will easily fit inside most standard backpacks, book bags, or binders for even more on-the-go fun.

The Star Wars coloring book comes with different pages for coloring, puzzles, and games like connect the dots, matching, counting, and more. Activity books are great for encouraging creativity and imagination while kids learn about math and drawing.

Each activity book comes with 4 different colors of crayons, and the pages feature perforated edges that will allow your child to easily rip out their artwork to display at home or at school. All pieces included are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision.
